headerDisplay: Native TypeScript support for legacy **TC-series** (Tend/Seedonk) myQ garage cameras. Streams video, camera audio, and HomeKit push-to-talk without a phone or Python runtime. Newer WebRTC/KVS myQ cameras are not supported.
footerDisplay: Use a Homebridge child bridge for camera isolation. Run `homebridge-myq-camera-doctor --live 30` from the Homebridge terminal to validate credentials, FFmpeg, signaling, and media.

tokenFile.title: OAuth token file override
tokenFile.description: Optional. Leave blank to use Homebridge storage: <storage>/myq-camera/token.json. The plugin rotates this token file atomically.

ffmpeg.title: Custom FFmpeg path
ffmpeg.description: Leave blank to use Homebridge's bundled FFmpeg. A custom build needs libx264, libopus, and libfdk_aac for talkback.

talkback.title: HomeKit push-to-talk
talkback.description: Routes HomeKit return audio into the same native camera session.

copyVideo.title: Copy native H.264
copyVideo.description: Avoids video transcoding but advertises only native 1280×720 at 20 fps. Leave off for maximum HomeKit compatibility.

deviceId.title: Camera device ID or myQ alias
deviceId.description: Leave blank to use the first TC-series camera on the account.
